```json
[
  {
    "idea": "EV Charger Expansion Momentum Surge",
    "family": "local_economy_weirdness",
    "data": {
      "source": "OpenChargeMap daily EV charger count aggregation through openchargemap adapter",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "daily",
      "stable": true

    "behavior": "Weekly net additions of EV chargers across North America spike when municipal/utility deployment accelerates, signaling local infrastructure confidence and consumer EV demand confidence.",

      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLK",
      "rationale": "EV charging infrastructure expansion correlates with technology and industrial adoption cycles, benefiting semiconductor and electric vehicle ecosystem players."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "If weekly net EV charger additions exceed 90th percentile of trailing 12-week average, enter long on Monday open",

      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 12,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "EV charger deployment is volatile week-to-week and crosses the 90th percentile threshold several times per quarter, especially in spring/fall deployment seasons."
  },

      "type": "api",

  {

      "entry": "If weekly change in MORTGAGE30US exceeds +25bp and closes above prior close, enter long XLY at Friday close",

  {
```
